trigger.reason: 0012 passed synthetic negative QEMU but exposed production blockers in post-filter denial

authority_stability_requirements: eligibility cached in CFS metadata must be derived from stable frozen admission state
caller-dependent or per-attempt policy lookup must not be cached in CFS tree metadata
revocation and refresh events must propagate before any production picker-visible claim

candidate_matrix.name: augment_existing_cfs_tree
candidate_matrix.summary: add picker-visible lease eligibility summary analogous to min_vruntime
candidate_matrix.strength: closest to existing EEVDF pruning and can avoid scan
candidate_matrix.risk: hot sched_entity augmentation, invalidation complexity, cannot encode caller-dependent authority
candidate_matrix.verdict: next P5A-R2 design target only if eligibility is frozen, task-local, and invalidation-modeled

candidate_matrix.name: separate_eligible_timeline
candidate_matrix.summary: maintain a second CFS-local tree containing only pickable entities
candidate_matrix.risk: large hot layout and upstream drift impact
candidate_matrix.verdict: semantic reference, too invasive for next upstream-shaped L0 slice

candidate_matrix.name: lease_bucket_before_cfs
candidate_matrix.summary: select Domain/SchedContext/ExecutionGrant bucket before ordinary CFS
candidate_matrix.strength: best match for HyperTag, Domain switch cost, and datacenter single-OS goals
candidate_matrix.risk: larger architecture requiring cgroup, load-balance, migration, wakeup, and tick integration
candidate_matrix.verdict: long-horizon production direction and constraint on L0

candidate_matrix.name: bounded_candidate_window
candidate_matrix.summary: inspect only a fixed number of alternate CFS candidates

candidate_matrix.name: block_or_quarantine_before_pick
candidate_matrix.summary: remove denied tasks from eligibility through explicit settlement state
candidate_matrix.risk: pick-time mutation is too late unless modeled; compatibility risk
candidate_matrix.verdict: required settlement state, not sufficient picker mechanism

recommended_next.name: P5A-R2 selector model gate
recommended_next.direction: Candidate A constrained by Candidate C
must_not_do: continue extending 0012 fallback as production path
claim production runtime denial from synthetic comm-prefix tests
add hot layout fields without object/layout gate
required_questions: CFS lag/load inclusion of ineligible tasks
